title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
